name: New York Bistro Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breast halves, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil and sliced garlic in a large skillet. Cover and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
2. Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness of about 1/2 inch. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Uncover the skillet, stir the garlic to one side of the skillet, and add the seasoned chicken. Cook for 4 to 5 minutes per side until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Use a slotted spoon to remove the garlic and squeeze the juice out over the chicken. Discard the peels.
5. Transfer the chicken and garlic to a serving dish and drizzle with the skillet juices.
